user_stories.title: Ingest Podcast Transcripts
user_stories.i_want_to: automatically clone and parse the 'lennys-podcast-transcripts' repository
user_stories.so_that: I have a local database of all episodes and transcripts for processing.
acceptance_criteria: System parses YAML frontmatter (guest, title, date, youtube_url, etc.) into an `Episodes` table.
System extracts the markdown body of the transcript.
user_stories.technical_notes: Use a rake task or background job (Sidekiq/GoodJob) to handle the git clone and parsing. Use a library like `front_matter_parser` for the markdown files.

user_stories.title: Text Chunking Strategy
user_stories.so_that: vector embeddings are accurate and context is preserved.
acceptance_criteria: Implement a chunking strategy (e.g., recursive character split, token-based, or paragraph-based).
Target chunk size ~500-1000 tokens with overlap.
Store chunks in a `TranscriptChunks` table with a foreign key to `Episodes`.
